image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about calcium muscle contraction.
Context visual: Calcium isn't just a nutrient; it's the key to muscle movement.
Escalation visual: When a nerve signals your muscle, calcium floods in like a wave.
Evidence visual: This triggers actin and myosin to interact, causing contraction. It's a dance of proteins!
Payoff visual: Without calcium, muscles stay relaxed. So, every lift, every sprint relies on this mineral.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow for more fascinating facts!
